heading: Apprehension of deserters and prisoners; operation of shore patrols
label: 8614 Apprehension of deserters and prisoners; operation of shore patrols
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7214.34 U.S.C. 606, .Aug. 2, 1946, ch. 756, § 2260 Stat. 856.5 U.S.C. 421g(d), .Aug. 2, 1946, ch. 756, § 40(d)60 Stat. 858.5 U.S.C. 412a, .Aug. 2, 1946, ch. 756, § 3960 Stat. 858In subsection (a) the word “naval” is omitted as surplusage.In subsection (b) the words “except the authority to prescribe regulations” are omitted, since contains no authority for the Secretary of the Navy to prescribe regulations for the administration of that section.34 U.S.C. 606

children.text: apprehend and deliver deserters, stragglers, and prisoners; and

children.label: b
children.text: The Secretary, to the extent he considers proper, may delegate the authority conferred by this section to any person in the Department of the Navy, with or without the authority to make successive redelegations.
